title: Route broadcast messages to default channel
description: Map nie relay broadcast/sealed_broadcast messages to the default channel Chat in the JMAP data store. Inbound: relay broadcast → MLS decrypt → store as Message with chatId = default channel id. Outbound: Message/set create in the default channel → MLS encrypt → relay broadcast. The relay primitive for channel messages is the existing broadcast; no new relay method needed.
close_reason: Inbound routing complete: BROADCAST→MLS decrypt→store.insert_message(channel_id). Outbound Message/set→encrypt→broadcast wired in nie-ib2s when JMAP HTTP layer lands.
